Regime Engine + Checklist Criteria (Grok v1.1)

Regime 判斷準則：

  • 🟢 Uptrend：VIX < 20 AND SPY > 20MA AND % > 20MA > 40%
  • 🟡 Correction：VIX 20–30 OR SPY 介乎 20MA–50MA OR % > 20MA 25–40%

  • Red Checklist（市場惡化信號）：共 5 項，檢查 RSI < 50、SPY < 20MA、A/D < 1.0、VIX > 20

Coach's Action Plan — Today's Playbook
Trading Outlook
Risk-off (Defensive)  Score: 7 / 9

VIX 高企（28.93，-5.49%）且趨勢向上，所有主要指數均在均線之下，市場廣度極差（S&P500 僅 17.9% 股票在 20MA 之上）。建議維持防守姿態，降低整體倉位，耐心等待 VIX 回落至 20 以下或指數出現放量止跌信號，再逐步加倉。

Risk Factors: VIX=28.9 (>25, high fear) | SPY RSI=27.7 (<35, oversold) | QQQ RSI=28.9 (<35, oversold) | F&G=13 (Extreme Fear) | SP500 >20MA=17.9% (<25%, breadth collapse)

Bear Case (利淡邏輯)
